revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template {{#if:{{{sometimes|}}}|sometimes{{sp}}}}adds an automatically generated '''[[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]'''{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}({{{category}}})|}}{{#if:{{{indirect|}}}|{{sp}}via an embedded template}}{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{space}}{{{conditions}}}}}. If the automatic short description is not optimal, replace it by adding {{tl|Short description}} at the top of the article. }}<includeonly>{{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|[[Category:Templates that generate short descriptions{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}for {{{category}}}|}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

If the automatic short description is not optimal, replace it by adding {{tl|Short description}} at the top of the article. }}<includeonly>{{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|[[Category:Templates that generate short descriptions{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}for {{{category}}}|}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

{{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template {{#if:{{{sometimes|}}}|sometimes{{sp}}}}adds an automatically generated '''[[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]'''{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}({{{category}}})|}}{{#if:{{{indirect|}}}|{{sp}}via an embedded template}}{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{space}}{{{conditions}}}}}. If the automatic short description is not optimal, replace it by adding {{tl|Short description}} at the top of the article. }}<includeonly>{{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|[[Category:s that generate short descriptions{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}for {{{category}}}|}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:55:05 on [[Template:Auto short description]]
revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template adds an automatically generated [[WP:Short description|short description]]. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: explain a little better what this template is for
revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template {{#if:{{{sometimes|}}}|sometimes{{sp}}}}adds an automatically generated '''[[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]'''{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}({{{category}}})|}}{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{space}}{{{conditions}}}}}. If the automatic short description can be improved, do so by adding {{tl|Short description}} to the article. }}<includeonly>{{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|[[Category:Templates that generate short descriptions{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}for {{{category}}}|}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template {{#if:{{{sometimes|}}}|sometimes{{sp}}}}adds an automatically generated '''[[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]'''{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}({{{category}}})|}}{{#if:{{{indirect|}}}|{{sp}}via an embedded template}}{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{space}}{{{conditions}}}}}. If the automatic short description is not optimal, replace it by adding {{tl|Short description}} at the top of the article. }}<includeonly>{{Category handler |nocat={{{nocat|}}} |template={{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates that generate short descriptions{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}for {{{category}}}|}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template {{#if:{{{sometimes|}}}|sometimes{{sp}}}}adds an automatically generated '''[[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]'''{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}({{{category}}})|}}{{#if:{{{indirect|}}}|{{sp}}via an embedded template}}{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{space}}{{{conditions}}}}}. If the automatic short description is not optimal, replace it by adding {{tl|Short description}} at the top of the article. }}<includeonly>{{Category handler |nocat={{{nocat|}}} |template={{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates that generate short descriptions{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}for {{{category}}}|}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Auto_short_description here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Auto_short_description for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This template {{#if:{{{sometimes|}}}|sometimes{{sp}}}}adds an automatically generated '''[[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]'''{{#if:{{{category|}}}|{{sp}}({{{category}}})|}}{{#if:{{{indirect|}}}|{{sp}}via an embedded template}}{{#if:{{{conditions|}}}|{{space}}{{{conditions}}}}}. If the automatic short description is not optimal, replace it by adding {{tl|Short description}} at the top of the article. }}<includeonly>{{Category handler |nocat={{{nocat|}}} |template={{Subpage other|<!-- do not categorise -->|}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
